categories.name: Titles & Navigation
categories.description: Ways to show a heading/topic — pick one (sometimes two) per segment

categories.name: Text Screens
categories.description: Lists, key points, speaker intros, grids, progress, disclaimers

types.name: Section Title
types.description: Full speaker video with semi-transparent dark overlay. Large centered serif title in uppercase white with text shadow.
types.when: Start of a new major section: Market Overview, Golden Visa, Broker Life, Investment Areas

types.name: Section Title Centered
types.description: Dark gradient background, no speaker. Centered serif title with one accent-colored keyword in yellow. Muted italic subtitle below.
types.when: Lighter section transitions, sub-topics within a chapter, thematic breaks

types.name: Lower Third Title
types.description: Title bar at the bottom of speaker frame — dark panel with yellow accent border on top. Title + subtitle.
types.when: Topic heading over speaker, softer transition than full section_title

types.name: Step Cards
types.description: Progressive reveal cards — steps fill in as the video advances. Shows viewer where they are in the process.
types.when: Video broken into 3-7 steps: buying process, due diligence, RERA licensing, visa application

types.name: Talking Head
types.description: Clean speaker shot without any overlays. Most powerful type for emotional impact and direct address.
types.when: Hook, personal broker stories, key insights, emotional moments, important warnings

types.name: Side Slide — Text
types.description: Text/bullets left (55%), speaker video right (45%). Serif title in yellow, body text with highlighted keywords, muted footnote.
types.when: Listing requirements, area features, ROI factors, commission structures, legal steps

types.name: Side Slide — Pills
types.description: Colored pill tags on the left + speaker on the right. Gradient background pills.
types.when: Quick takeaways, key recommendations, do/don't, pros/cons

types.name: Numbered List
types.description: Vertical list with numbered gradient badges. No speaker visible.
types.when: Listing 3-8 items: top areas, common mistakes, broker tips, investment criteria

types.name: Speaker Intro
types.description: Dark lower-third overlay on speaker video with yellow accent line. Name in uppercase serif, role/company in light sans-serif.
types.when: First appearance of host, guest broker, investor, or industry expert

types.name: Icon Grid
types.description: Title + 2-4 cards with icons in a row. Fullscreen with PIP speaker in corner.
types.when: Overview of investment types, property categories, service offerings, visa options

types.name: Disclaimer
types.description: Full-screen legal text on dark blurred background. Serif title. First paragraph in yellow accent. Remaining text in muted gray.
types.when: Opening of every video — legal and financial disclaimers for investment content

types.name: Circle / Venn
types.description: Nested or overlapping circles with labels + PIP speaker in corner.
types.when: Market share, investor segments, overlap between buyer types, part-whole relationships

types.name: Flow / Process
types.description: Blocks connected with arrows: A → B → C. Shows sequential process or cause-effect chains.
types.when: Property buying flow, visa application process, RERA licensing steps, investment funnel

types.name: Chart — Curve
types.description: Stats row at top + SVG line/area chart + axis labels + legend at bottom.
types.when: Price trends over time, market cycles, ROI progression, rental yield trends

types.name: Chart — Bars
types.description: Column/bar chart with category labels on x-axis. Gradient-filled bars.
types.when: Rental yields by area, commission comparison, price per sqft across communities

types.name: Comparison
types.description: Two items side by side with different colors. Vertical bars showing relative values.
types.when: Off-plan vs ready, Dubai vs London commissions, before/after, two areas compared

types.name: Math / Equation
types.description: Visual arithmetic: stacked formula items on the left, equals sign, result card on the right.
types.when: ROI calculations, investment returns, commission math, rental yield modeling

types.name: Video Map
types.description: Central video box branching out to 3-5 related video thumbnails with arrows.
types.when: CTA for related content, navigation across content pillars, series recommendations

types.name: CTA / QR Code
types.description: Split: 45% dark panel with title, QR code, 'Link in Description' + yellow arrow; 55% speaker.
types.when: End of video or mid-roll CTA. Drive to corerealty.ae, WhatsApp, booking page

types.name: CTV / End Screen
types.description: End screen: gradient overlay left with YouTube video card + speaker right.
types.when: Last 20 seconds of video, prompt to watch next video or subscribe
